question: How do I access the Mentorship module?
answer: Log in to the Entrepreneur Portal and navigate to the Mentorship section from the side menu.

question: How can I see who my assigned mentor is?
answer: The Mentorship page displays your assigned mentor's details, including their name, email address, and contact information.

question: Can I contact my mentor through the platform?
answer: Yes. You can communicate with your mentor by submitting mentorship queries through the Ask Query feature.

question: How do I ask a question to my mentor?
answer: Open the Mentorship page, click the 'Ask Query' button, enter your question, and submit it.

question: Can I view all the questions I've asked my mentor?
answer: Yes. The platform displays your complete query history, including the query, response, date, time, and current status.

question: How do I know whether my mentor has replied?
answer: Each query has a status such as Answered or Unanswered, and the mentor's response appears once it has been submitted.

question: Can I edit my query after submitting it?
answer: Yes. You can edit your query until your mentor submits a response.

question: Can I delete a query I submitted?
answer: Yes. You may delete your query as long as your mentor has not yet responded.

question: Why can't I edit or delete my query anymore?
answer: Once your mentor responds, the query becomes read-only and can no longer be edited or deleted.

question: Can I filter my mentorship queries?
answer: Yes. You can filter your queries using available date and status filters.

question: What information is shown for each mentorship query?
answer: Each query displays the date, time, question, mentor response, mentor name, status, and available actions.

question: What should I do if I'm not satisfied with my mentor?
answer: You can submit a mentor re-pairing request through the Mentorship module for admin review.

question: How do I request a different mentor?
answer: Open the Re-pairing Request section, choose a reason or provide additional details, and submit your request.

question: What reasons can I choose when requesting a new mentor?
answer: You can select reasons such as Unresponsive Mentor, Unsatisfactory Answer, Delayed Response, or provide another reason.

question: Can I submit multiple mentor change requests at the same time?
answer: No. Only one active re-pairing request is allowed until the current request is resolved.

question: What happens after I submit a mentor change request?
answer: Your request remains pending until the administrator reviews and approves or rejects it.

question: Who answers my questions while my mentor change request is pending?
answer: Your current mentor continues to respond to your queries until a new mentor is officially assigned.

question: How will I know when a new mentor has been assigned?
answer: After the administrator approves your request, your mentor assignment is updated and the new mentor's details appear in your Mentorship page.

question: Will I be asked to provide feedback about my mentor?
answer: Yes. After your programme cycle is completed, you'll be invited to complete a mentorship feedback survey.

question: Why is the mentorship survey important?
answer: Your feedback helps TEF evaluate mentor performance and supports mentor certification decisions.

question: What happens after I submit a mentor change request?
answer: Your request remains pending until the administrator reviews and makes a decision.

question: Will my current mentor continue helping me while my request is pending?
answer: Yes. Your current mentor remains responsible for answering your queries until a new mentor is assigned.

question: How will I know if a new mentor has been assigned?
answer: Once approved, your Mentorship page will display the details of your newly assigned mentor.

question: Can I see the status of my mentor change request?
answer: Yes. The request status is updated as it progresses through the review process.

question: Will I receive a mentorship survey?
answer: Yes. After completing the programme cycle, you'll be invited to complete a mentorship feedback survey.

question: Why should I complete the mentorship survey?
answer: Your feedback helps TEF evaluate mentor performance and supports certification decisions.

question: When can I complete the mentorship survey?
answer: The survey becomes available after the programme process is completed and within the timeline defined by TEF.

question: Can I answer the mentorship survey more than once?
answer: No. The mentorship survey can only be submitted once for each mentor.

question: Can I edit my survey after submitting it?
answer: No. Submitted survey responses cannot be modified.

question: Will I receive reminders to complete the survey?
answer: Yes. TEF may send periodic email reminders until the survey deadline.

question: What type of questions are included in the mentorship survey?
answer: The survey contains rating-based questions with options ranging from Poor to Excellent, along with comments.

question: Can I communicate with any mentor on the platform?
answer: No. You can only interact with the mentor assigned to your profile.

question: Can I have more than one mentor at the same time?
answer: No. Each entrepreneur is assigned one mentor at a time.

question: Can I view my mentor's contact details anytime?
answer: Yes. Your assigned mentor's available contact details remain accessible from the Mentorship page.

question: Will my mentorship queries be saved?
answer: Yes. All submitted mentorship queries and responses remain available in your query history.

question: Can I track all my mentorship activities?
answer: Yes. Your Mentorship page allows you to monitor queries, responses, mentor details, and request statuses.

question: Is mentorship available throughout my programme?
answer: Mentorship is available according to the programme's mentorship process and mentor assignment.

question: Can the chatbot answer questions about the Mentorship module?
answer: Yes. The chatbot can explain mentorship features, workflows, and guide you through common processes.

question: Where can I check the progress of my mentorship requests?
answer: You can monitor the status of your mentorship queries and mentor change requests from the Mentorship section.

question: What can I do through the Mentorship module?
answer: You can view your mentor, ask questions, track responses, request a mentor change, complete surveys, and monitor your mentorship activities.
